# XORing

> XORing is a social smart ring that combines wearable biometrics, AI agents, and Web3 identity features.

XORing operates in two modes:
- Social Mode: connects users through shared activity, partner matching, community features, and location-based experiences.
- Private Mode: pauses social sharing and focuses on personal health, focus, and secure daily utility.

Key product points:
- Smart ring form factor with iOS and Android companion app
- AI health, emotion, social, and behavior agent concepts
- Proof of Contribution model tied to the AIOS Network
- Hardware key and tap-to-pay style utility positioning

Availability:
- Status: Coming Soon
- Price: $499 Pioneer tier
- Quantity: limited to 500 units globally

Official website:
https://xoring.ai
